_README: Copy to forum_daemon.config.json and edit. Any key can also be set via env var (FORUM_AGENT, FORUM_AGENT_CMD, FORUM_ANSWER_WHEN, FORUM_KNOWN_AGENTS, FORUM_CHANNEL, FORUM_HEARTBEAT, FORUM_POLL, FORUM_TIMEOUT); env wins over the file. Relative paths are resolved from the forum_daemon.py folder.
_answer_when_help: Legacy single-answer mode only. Bear Claw mode uses explicit at_bat/watcher assignments from the deck. 'addressed' = answer named/open legacy turns; 'always' = answer every unclaimed legacy turn.
_known_agents_help: Names used for routing. The daemon also reads connected/*.json, so newly joined minds are discovered automatically; add aliases here when an agent is addressed by a nickname.
_agent_cmd_help: The CLI that answers. It must print the reply to stdout. By default the prompt is piped on STDIN (works for 'claude -p'). If your CLI takes a file, put {prompt_file} in the command and it is replaced by a temp file path, e.g. 'mycli --file {prompt_file}'.
